## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync on project status, performance, and holiday plans.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Technical Debt Resolved:** All website audit issues are fixed; a re-audit is scheduled for Jan 8 due to holiday OOO.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [**Programmatic Pages On Track:** CMS implementation is due Dec 19, enabling a mid-Jan launch for a few initial pages.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [**Content Publishing Accelerated:** To clear a backlog from recent site updates, two weeks of content will be published this week, with next week's content going live early (Dec 25) to avoid holiday delays.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [**January Strategy:** The first meeting of the new year will align content strategy with Datagrid's 2025 product roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

## Topics

### Technical Website Audit

  - [All audit tasks are complete (WanderUp & GrowthX).](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
  - [A re-audit is scheduled for Jan 8 to validate fixes.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)
      - [**Why:** Accounts for holiday OOO schedules.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### Content & Editorial

  - [**Publishing Backlog:** Two weeks of content will be published this week to clear a backlog caused by recent WanderUp site updates.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=167.0)
  - [**Next Week's Content:** Will be published early (Dec 25) to avoid holiday OOO delays.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Newsletter:** The latest edition was sent by Kaitlin.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=75.0)

### Programmatic Pages

  - [Fran's page mock-ups are approved.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [CMS implementation is due Dec 19.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [**Goal:** Launch a few initial pages by mid-Jan.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

### Performance & Traffic

  - [December performance is stable, with no major alarms.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [A holiday-related traffic dip is expected but not a concern.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic:** Slow, mirroring the overall site trend.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [**Scrunch Rankings:** Datagrid maintains its competitive lead in tracked categories.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)

### January Strategic Alignment

  - [The first meeting of the new year will align content strategy with Datagrid's 2025 product roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
  - [**Why:** To ensure content supports evolving product priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

### Holiday Schedule & Communication

  - [**Vivek OOO:**](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
      - [Dec 22–Jan 2](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
      - [Jan 12–16](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Coverage Plan:** Vivek will monitor Slack for emergencies; an internal team provides full coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [**Meeting Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
      - [**Jan 12–16:** No sync; an async update will be sent instead.](https://fathom.video/share/9bGx3jzifyh7A-EV2_MsiSTLKu3EDXYZ?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
